text.title: Project Closure Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Sponsor said 'looks good' but signed nothing.
Lessons session scheduled after team has moved on.
antipattern.fix: Run lessons in final sprint before disband.

antipattern.symptom: Ops discovers they own it via inbound ticket.
antipattern.fix: Require signature; pair on first 2 weeks if needed.
